note: Hand-maintained VERIFIED reporting woven into the narrative — one idea per step, per the pacing system. make_synthetic.mjs (and later make_scene_data.py) merges each item into its scene's JSON with the source in _meta. Edit copy HERE, then re-run the pipeline. url_status 'unverified' means the citation (publication, date, byline) is confirmed but the deep link still needs a final click-through before publication.

gembogl_frost.placement: step at the moment the frost effect triggers
gembogl_frost.text: This is not a forecast any more. In June, frost covered garden plots at Gembogl, in Chimbu.
gembogl_frost.sub: The frost season opened while the event was still strengthening.
gembogl_frost.source: The National, 22 June 2026 — “El-Nino signs hit Highlands”

kaukau_energy.placement: step, early — establishes the stakes of the mound
kaukau_energy.text: Kaukau is not just my crop. It is about 43 % of all the food energy this country eats.
kaukau_energy.sub: Prof. C. Chang — ACIAR research, reported in The National.
kaukau_energy.source: The National / Prof. C. Chang, ACIAR research coverage

trust_accounts.placement: lead-in, stated without editorializing — the calendar that follows is the response
trust_accounts.text: Only four provinces — East New Britain, West New Britain, Morobe and Milne Bay — hold monitored disaster trust accounts. None of them is in the Highlands frost zone.
trust_accounts.source: The National, 22 June 2026, quoting the National Disaster Centre

pm_directive.placement: one sentence under the DEWS map, linking the calendar to the directive
pm_directive.text: The Prime Minister has directed every province and district to prepare — responsibility placed explicitly at the provincial and local level.
